description: An accepted implemented requirement loses its graph implementation/specification evidence.
expected_error: Implemented requirement graph-traceability:REQ-0002 has no graph implementation/specification evidence

mutations.replace:
- subject:
    id: graph-traceability:REQ-0002
    type: Requirement
  predicate: SPECIFIED_BY
  object:
    id: docs/reference/project-model/requirements.registry.yml
    type: Document
mutations.with:
- subject:
    id: graph-traceability:REQ-9999
    type: Requirement
  predicate: SPECIFIED_BY
  object:
    id: docs/reference/project-model/requirements.registry.yml
    type: Document
